rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.28+commit.7893614a"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"P256Verifier","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Dispatcher for P-256 (secp256r1) signature verification.         Order of attempts:           1. RIP-7212 precompile at 0x100 (Base, Polygon zkEVM, Optimism              Odyssey, Arbitrum Nitro \u22652.5, Scroll, Linea, Anvil w/ --odyssey).           2. Deploy it yourself on chains that need it.           3. Returns false (neither path succeeded).
